retry_reason: refcount_set always succeeds unconditionally; there is no failure path to retry.
contract_summary: This is a set-wrapper that initializes a newly allocated i915_vma_resource. It sets the hold_count refcount to 1, establishing the initial reference. The caller must later release this reference via a corresponding put (e.g., i915_vma_resource_put) when the resource is no longer needed. The function also initializes the internal spinlock, unbind fence, and chain fence as part of the resource setup. It must be called exactly once after allocation and before any other use of the resource.
